_comment: Maps execution-spec-tests exception keys to Besu error-message patterns. All patterns must match messages produced by validateAndProcessBlock (not the engine API layer). Source: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/25fce5b479f48bf5bf66a3cd773690532f08c6ac/packages/testing/src/execution_testing/client_clis/clis/besu.py#L321

substring.BlockException.BLOCK_ACCESS_LIST_GAS_LIM: Block access list validation failed for block
substring.BlockException.INCORRECT_BLOB_GAS_USED: block did not consume expected blob gas
substring.BlockException.INVALID_GAS_USED: failed to validate output of imported block
substring.BlockException.INVALID_LOG_BLOOM: failed to validate output of imported block
substring.BlockException.INVALID_RECEIPTS_ROOT: failed to validate output of imported block
substring.BlockException.INVALID_STATE_ROOT: World State Root does not match expected value

substring.BlockException.UNCLE_PARENT_INCORRECT: failed to validate output of imported block
substring.TransactionException.GASLIMIT_PRICE_PROD: invalid Upfront gas cost cannot exceed 2^256 Wei
substring.TransactionException.INSUFFICIENT_MAX_FE: transaction invalid tx max fee per blob gas less than block blob gas fee
transaction invalid gasPrice is less than the current BaseFee
substring.TransactionException.NONCE_IS_MAX: invalid Nonce must be less than
substring.TransactionException.PRIORITY_GREATER_TH: transaction invalid max priority fee per gas cannot be greater than max fee per gas
substring.TransactionException.RLP_INVALID_VALUE: failed to validate output of imported block
substring.TransactionException.TYPE_3_TX_CONTRACT_: transaction invalid transaction blob transactions must have a to address
substring.TransactionException.TYPE_3_TX_PRE_FORK: Transaction type BLOB is invalid, accepted transaction types are
substring.TransactionException.TYPE_3_TX_WITH_FULL: Failed to decode transactions from block parameter
substring.TransactionException.TYPE_3_TX_ZERO_BLOB: transaction blob transactions must specify one or more versioned hashes
substring.TransactionException.TYPE_4_EMPTY_AUTHOR: transaction invalid transaction code delegation transactions must have a non-empty code delegation list
substring.TransactionException.TYPE_4_TX_CONTRACT_: transaction invalid transaction code delegation transactions must have a to address
substring.TransactionException.TYPE_4_TX_PRE_FORK: transaction invalid Transaction type DELEGATE_CODE is invalid
substring.TransactionException.TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED: is invalid, accepted transaction types are

substring.InvalidUnclesHash: failed to validate output of imported block

substring.RLP_ExpectedAsList: failed to validate output of imported block

substring.TR_FeeCapLessThanBlocks: transaction invalid gasPrice is less than the current BaseFee
substring.TR_NonceHasMaxValue: invalid Nonce must be less than
substring.TR_NonceTooHigh: does not match sender account nonce
substring.TR_RLP_WRONGVALUE: failed to validate output of imported block
substring.TR_TipGtFeeCap: transaction invalid max priority fee per gas cannot be greater than max fee per gas

regex.BlockException.INCORRECT_BLOCK_FORMAT: Block access list hash mismatch, calculated:\s*(0x[a-f0-9]+)\s+header:\s*(0x[a-f0-9]+)|Block access list validation failed for block 0x[a-f0-9]+
regex.BlockException.INVALID_BAL_EXTRA_ACCOUNT: Block access list hash mismatch, calculated:\s*(0x[a-f0-9]+)\s+header:\s*(0x[a-f0-9]+)|Block access list validation failed for block 0x[a-f0-9]+
regex.BlockException.INVALID_BLOCK_ACCESS_LIST: Block access list hash mismatch, calculated:\s*(0x[a-f0-9]+)\s+header:\s*(0x[a-f0-9]+)|Block access list validation failed for block 0x[a-f0-9]+
regex.BlockException.INVALID_BLOCK_HASH: Computed block hash 0x[0-9a-f]+ does not match block hash parameter 0x[0-9a-f]+|Header validation failed \((FULL|LIGHT)\)|Parent block with hash
regex.BlockException.INVALID_DEPOSIT_EVENT_LAY: Invalid (amount|index|pubKey|signature|withdrawalCred) (offset|size): expected (\d+), but got (-?\d+)|Invalid deposit log length\. Must be \d+ bytes, but is \d+ bytes
regex.BlockException.INVALID_REQUESTS: Invalid execution requests|Requests hash mismatch, calculated: 0x[0-9a-f]+ header: 0x[0-9a-f]+
regex.BlockException.RLP_BLOCK_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Block size of \d+ bytes exceeds limit of \d+ bytes
regex.BlockException.SYSTEM_CONTRACT_CALL_FAIL: System call halted|System call did not execute to completion
regex.BlockException.SYSTEM_CONTRACT_EMPTY: (Invalid system call, no code at address)|(Invalid system call address:)
regex.BlockException.UNKNOWN_PARENT: Parent block with hash 0x[0-9a-f]+ not present
regex.BlockException.UNKNOWN_PARENT_ZERO: Parent block with hash 0x[0-9a-f]+ not present
regex.TransactionException.GAS_LIMIT_EXCEEDS_M: transaction invalid Transaction gas limit must be at most \d+
regex.TransactionException.INITCODE_SIZE_EXCEE: transaction invalid Initcode size of \d+ exceeds maximum size of \d+
regex.TransactionException.INSUFFICIENT_ACCOUN: transaction invalid transaction up-front cost 0x[0-9a-f]+ exceeds transaction sender account balance 0x[0-9a-f]+
regex.TransactionException.INTRINSIC_GAS_BELOW: transaction invalid intrinsic gas cost \d+ exceeds gas limit \d+
regex.TransactionException.INTRINSIC_GAS_TOO_L: transaction invalid intrinsic gas cost \d+ exceeds gas limit \d+
regex.TransactionException.NONCE_MISMATCH_TOO_: transaction invalid transaction nonce \d+ does not match sender account nonce \d+
transaction invalid transaction nonce \d+ below sender account nonce \d+
regex.TransactionException.SENDER_NOT_EOA: transaction invalid Sender 0x[0-9a-f]+ has deployed code and so is not authorized to send transactions
regex.TransactionException.TYPE_3_TX_BLOB_COUN: Blob transaction has too many blobs: \d+|Invalid Blob Count: \d+
regex.TransactionException.TYPE_3_TX_MAX_BLOB_: Blob transaction 0x[0-9a-f]+ exceeds block blob gas limit: \d+ > \d+|total blob gas \d+ exceeds max blob gas per block \d+
regex.SenderNotEOAorNoCASH: has deployed code and so is not authorized|transaction up-front cost 0x[0-9a-f]+ exceeds transaction sender account balance
regex.TR_BLOBLIST_OVERSIZE: Blob transaction has too many blobs: \d+|Invalid Blob Count: \d+
regex.TR_FeeCapLessThanBlocksORGasLimitReached: gasPrice is less than the current BaseFee|provided gas insufficient
regex.TR_FeeCapLessThanBlocksORNoFunds: gasPrice is less than the current BaseFee|transaction up-front cost 0x[0-9a-f]+ exceeds transaction sender account balance
regex.TR_NoFundsOrGas: transaction up-front cost 0x[0-9a-f]+ exceeds transaction sender account balance|provided gas insufficient
regex.UnknownParent: Parent block with hash 0x[0-9a-f]+ not present
regex.UnknownParent2: Parent block with hash 0x[0-9a-f]+ not present
